faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn more about how LuckBox works

items.title: What is LuckBox and how does it work?
items.description: LuckBox is an innovative AI-powered fortune guidance platform that combines traditional Eastern wisdom with cutting-edge technology. Think of it as your personal advisor available 24/7, offering insights for career decisions, relationship guidance, and life choices. Our platform analyzes your birth information using both ancient Eastern methodologies and advanced AI to provide personalized, actionable advice.

items.title: How does LuckBox generate accurate readings?
items.description: LuckBox creates accurate readings through a unique dual-approach system. When you input your birth information, our sophisticated AI analyzes it using traditional Eastern astrology principles combined with modern data analysis. This blend of ancient wisdom and technology ensures comprehensive, personalized insights that become more refined over time through continuous learning from user feedback.

items.title: What types of readings does LuckBox offer?
items.description: LuckBox provides a comprehensive range of readings covering all major life aspects: career guidance, love and relationships, wealth opportunities, personality analysis, and health insights. Each reading type is specifically designed to offer deep insights and practical advice for your unique situation, helping you make informed decisions about your future.

items.title: Can I try LuckBox for free?
items.description: Yes! LuckBox offers a free plan that includes 3 readings per day, basic fortune analysis, essential life guidance, and access to all reading types. This allows you to experience our platform's capabilities and understand how our AI-powered insights can benefit your life decisions before choosing a premium plan.

items.title: What makes LuckBox different from traditional fortune telling?
items.description: Unlike traditional fortune telling, LuckBox provides data-driven, actionable insights powered by AI technology. We don't just predict what might happen - we offer clear, practical guidance based on both Eastern wisdom and modern analytical methods. Plus, you can access your readings anytime, track predictions, and receive regular updates as circumstances change.

items.title: How can I get the most out of my LuckBox readings?
items.description: To maximize your LuckBox experience, we recommend starting with specific questions about areas of your life you want to explore. Premium users can ask follow-up questions for deeper insights, track their readings over time, and use our interactive AI chat feature for clarification. Regular readings help you stay aligned with your life's optimal path.

items.title: Is my personal information secure with LuckBox?
items.description: Absolutely. LuckBox takes data privacy seriously and employs industry-standard encryption to protect your personal information. We only use your birth information to generate accurate readings and never share your data with third parties. Your trust and privacy are our top priorities.

items.title: How often should I consult LuckBox?
items.description: While you can access LuckBox 24/7, we recommend regular consultations - perhaps weekly or monthly - to stay aligned with your life's path. Important decisions or life changes are ideal times for additional readings. Premium users have unlimited access and can consult whenever they need guidance.

items.title: Can LuckBox help with specific life decisions?
items.description: Yes! Whether you're considering a career change, exploring relationship possibilities, or making important life choices, LuckBox provides targeted insights and practical guidance. Our AI analyzes your unique circumstances to offer personalized advice that helps you make informed decisions.

items.title: What's included in the Premium plan?
items.description: The Premium plan offers unlimited readings, interactive AI chat capabilities, follow-up questions, and deeper insights across all reading types. Premium users enjoy priority access to new features, comprehensive analysis, and the ability to track their fortune patterns over time for more informed decision-making.
